overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character running through Night City's downtown waterfront district during golden hour. The character navigates elevated walkways, covered plazas with neon lighting, and open urban spaces with futuristic skyscrapers and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway overlooking highway and city skyline

events.description: character turns right to follow the curved walkway

agents.ego_description: running forward under the overpass then turning right along the elevated walkway

entered.detail: large concrete structure forming the roof of the walkway
metal railings lining the edge of the elevated walkway
tall palm trees visible along the walkway
tall futuristic buildings with dust and smoke rising between them
multi-lane highway visible beneath the walkway
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
large white domed stadium structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a concrete overpass with a view of Night City's skyline. The character runs forward along an elevated walkway, passing palm trees and metal railings, then turns right. Skyscrapers with atmospheric smoke dominate the background while a highway runs below.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved elevated walkway with stadium view

events.description: camera curves left following the walkway bend

agents.ego_description: running along the curved walkway with the stadium visible on the right

entered.detail: curved highway ramp connecting to the main road

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a curved elevated walkway with the large stadium structure prominent on the right. The path curves left, revealing more of the highway infrastructure below while the skyscrapers shift to the left of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza with green neon ceiling lights

events.description: entering darker covered area with prominent green neon ceiling lights

agents.ego_description: running through a covered urban plaza passing homeless encampments and concrete pillars

notable_agents.action: sitting near a tent in the homeless encampment

entered.detail: grid of green illuminated panels on the ceiling
large square concrete pillars supporting the overpass
makeshift tents and shelters along the walkway edge
scattered litter and debris on the concrete ground

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker covered plaza illuminated by green neon ceiling lights. The area features concrete support pillars and homeless encampments with tents on the left side. The atmosphere shifts from bright sunlight to a dimmer, artificially lit environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront walkway with sun glare

events.description: approaching waterfront with intense sun glare and backlit scene

agents.ego_description: running toward the waterfront with bright sun glare ahead

entered.detail: calm water surface reflecting the golden hour sunlight
industrial dock structures visible across the water
vertical digital advertisement screens on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark plaza into a covered waterfront walkway. Bright golden hour sun creates intense glare over the ocean water visible through the railings. Digital advertising posters line the right wall while the sun illuminates the distant docks and water.

events.description: turning right away from the waterfront into the open plaza

agents.ego_description: turning right away from the waterfront and running into the plaza area

notable_agents.action: walking across the plaza in the distance

entered.detail: open concrete plaza area with circular patterns
short black and yellow traffic bollards
contemporary high-rise buildings with glass facades

segments.scene_description: The character turns right away from the waterfront into a sunlit urban plaza. The stadium structure is visible ahead, framed by palm trees. The open plaza features concrete surfaces, bollards, and scattered pedestrians walking through the golden hour light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic urban landscape that shifts from open elevated walkways into a dim neon plaza before emerging into a sun-drenched waterfront. It begins under a concrete overpass, moving forward past palm trees and metal railings with the smoky skyline and a highway visible below. As the path curves left, the camera passes a massive stadium structure before transitioning from the bright daylight into a darker covered plaza illuminated by green neon ceiling lights and lined with homeless encampments. The scene then opens up as the character emerges from the shadows onto a waterfront walkway, where intense golden hour glare reflects off the ocean water beside digital advertising posters. Finally, the camera turns away from the coast and enters a wide, sunlit urban plaza filled with pedestrians and framed by palm trees leading back toward the stadium.
